title: Girlfriend of Steel Special Version
wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel Special Version             Quote Post by SSGokuJr » Mon Aug 14, 2006 1:50 am I was searching Google image search on Girlfriend of steel and I ran across this site, its in spanish so I don't know if it is real or not. but it clearly says Play Station 2. [url]http://www.gamekult.com/tout/jeux/fiches/J000076509.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Mon Aug 14, 2006 2:44 am Spanish? Parle vous franÃ§ais? ;) Ok, I almost forgot everything about french, but it seems to say something about a "special version" from GeneX, a progressiv scan option , Dolby 5.1 and additional scenarios. And it says that it was released on 30 March 2006 in Japan. babelfishs pseudo-translation wrote: The tenth birthday of the diffusion of Evangelion will be an apparently sufficient alibi to leave a version PS2 the play to success KÃ´tetsu No Girlfriend, left at the origin on Saturn then PSone. Its editor, GeneX, do not hesitate to speak about "special version", insofar as this adaptation proposes a progressive option scan 480p, the sound in Dolby 5.1ch, and to several additional scenarios, doubled by the actors of the series that goes from oneself. Play of adventure completely in Japanese, this alternative history, considered sometimes as an episode with whole share of the series, puts in scene a new female character, Mana Kirishima, which will integrate the same college as Shinji Ikari and the others control of Evangelion. The exit of the play is scheduled for March 2006 in Japan. See the images

[]:             Quote Post by SSGokuJr » Mon Aug 14, 2006 3:18 am well sorry if I can't tell the diffence between spanish and French, all I know is that I don't understand them. back on topic: so it's alreay been released in Japan in march, so how come no one found this out before.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Aug 14, 2006 3:26 am Looks interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 14, 2006 8:17 am Just a PS2 re-issue. I could have sworn we had a thread about this already, but I'm too lazy to look. This will be at least the fourth time this game has been released. It's been on PlayStation, Saturn, and PC already.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Mon Aug 14, 2006 9:04 am The game (For the PS2) has been out for a looong time already...

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 15, 2006 12:54 am There will be a release of GoS special version for PC: http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/koutetsu_ps2/news.html

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Tue Aug 22, 2006 7:31 pm it seems like a re-release of the game with some new scenes and artwork by Gainax (I don't recall seeing those images of Shinji in the cockpit of the other mecha, and why else would Gainax be displaying them on their home page and the French review site?).

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Tue Aug 22, 2006 8:33 pm Another Re-release then?! Jeez, Gainax IS doing it's milking...
